# AI Kit by AINative Studio

> Framework-agnostic SDK for building production-ready AI interfaces. React, Vue, Svelte, and Next.js support.

## Packages

- @ainative/ai-kit: React hooks and components for AI-powered applications
- @ainative/ai-kit-vue: Vue composables for AI integration
- @ainative/ai-kit-svelte: Svelte stores for AI applications
- @ainative/ai-kit-nextjs: Next.js utilities and middleware
- @ainative/ai-kit-zerodb: ZeroDB client SDK for vector search
- @ainative/ai-kit-auth: Authentication utilities for AI apps
- @ainative/ai-kit-design-system: Pre-built UI components
- @ainative/ai-kit-testing: Testing utilities and mocks
- @ainative/ai-kit-safety: Safety guardrails and content moderation
- @ainative/ai-kit-rlhf: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback

## Install

npm install @ainative/ai-kit

## Features

- Streaming AI chat with real-time rendering
- Multi-agent orchestration
- AI safety guardrails
- Usage analytics dashboard
- Full TypeScript support

- Demo: https://aikit.ainative.studio
- GitHub: https://github.com/AINative-Studio/ai-kit
